name: BLOOMZ (176B)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (BLOOM architecture), instruction fine-tuned on xP3
note: BLOOM 176B fine-tuned on the xP3 crosslingual task mixture for zero-shot multilingual instruction following.

results.notes: HumanEval pass@1, Python, zero-shot; from the model-index in the HF model card (openai_humaneval, test split). pass@10 (26.53) and pass@100 (48.44) are also on the card but have no corresponding taxonomy slug.
SuperGLUE CB (CommitmentBank) subtask, validation, zero-shot accuracy.

25-shot acc_norm (harness|arc:challenge|25 = 0.55375), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation-run JSON for bigscience/bloomz (confirmed config_general.model_name = 'bigscience/bloomz', the 176B model), confirmed via direct fetch of the raw results JSON.
10-shot acc_norm (harness|hellaswag|10 = 0.75234), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation-run JSON for bigscience/bloomz, confirmed via direct fetch of the raw results JSON.

5-shot, average accuracy across all 57 harness|hendrycksTest-*|5 subtasks (avg acc = 0.47740), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation-run JSON for bigscience/bloomz, computed directly from the raw results JSON using the leaderboard's standard MMLU aggregation method.
TruthfulQA MC2 (harness|truthfulqa:mc|0, mc2 = 0.43939), 0-shot, HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation-run JSON for bigscience/bloomz, confirmed via direct fetch of the raw results JSON.

verificationNotes: Confirmed on HF model card: 176B params, RAIL v1.0 license, Winogrande XL 59.27, XWinograd-English 69.08, ANLI-r1 48.6 all literally present. arXiv 2211.01786 (Crosslingual Generalization through Multitask Finetuning) was submitted November 3, 2022, exactly matching the record's release date. No changes made.
